completion.description: That's genuinely useful — it makes the next one better for the families who come after you.

questions.question: Would you tell another parent to come?
Anything we missed?
questions.hint: A topic we didn't cover, or one you wished we'd spent more time on.
questions.placeholder: e.g. More on fussy toddlers, or what to do at restaurants.

questions.question: Anything else you'd like to tell us?
questions.hint: Any other comments — warm or critical. We read every one.

questions.question: Sharing permission
questions.consentText: You may share my comments to help reach more families — shown only as "Parent of a Year [X] student at FIS". No name needed.

followUp.placeholder: Which year is your child in? (optional)
